seeed_rpcble_init.message0: 初始化 BLE 设备 名称 %1
seeed_rpcble_init.tooltip: 初始化 Wio Terminal rpcBLE 设备并设置广播名称

seeed_rpcble_is_initialized.tooltip: 返回 BLEDevice 是否已初始化

seeed_rpcble_get_address.tooltip: 获取本机 BLE MAC 地址字符串

seeed_rpcble_set_mtu.tooltip: 设置 BLE 最大传输单元 MTU

seeed_rpcble_create_server.tooltip: 创建 BLE GATT 服务端对象

seeed_rpcble_server_create_service.message0: 服务端 %1 创建服务 %2 UUID %3
seeed_rpcble_server_create_service.tooltip: 在 BLE 服务端创建 GATT 服务

seeed_rpcble_service_start.tooltip: 启动指定 GATT 服务

seeed_rpcble_service_stop.tooltip: 停止指定 GATT 服务

seeed_rpcble_server_connected_count.message0: 服务端 %1 已连接客户端数量
seeed_rpcble_server_connected_count.tooltip: 获取连接到服务端的 BLE 客户端数量

seeed_rpcble_server_set_callbacks.message0: 设置服务端 %1 连接事件
seeed_rpcble_server_set_callbacks.tooltip: 为 BLE 服务端设置连接和断开回调

seeed_rpcble_create_characteristic.message0: 服务 %1 创建特征 %2 UUID %3 属性 %4
seeed_rpcble_create_characteristic.tooltip: 在 GATT 服务中创建特征值

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_set_permissi.message0: 设置特征 %1 访问权限 %2
seeed_rpcble_characteristic_set_permissi.tooltip: 设置特征值的 GATT 访问权限

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_add_notify_d.message0: 特征 %1 添加通知描述符
seeed_rpcble_characteristic_add_notify_d.tooltip: 为通知特征添加 BLE2902 描述符

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_add_descript.message0: 特征 %1 创建描述符 UUID %2 标志 %3 权限 %4 长度 %5
seeed_rpcble_characteristic_add_descript.tooltip: 为特征创建自定义描述符

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_set_value.tooltip: 设置特征值为文本数据

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_set_byte.tooltip: 设置特征值为 1 字节数据，适合电池电量等标准特征

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_get_value.tooltip: 读取本地特征值的当前文本数据

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_notify.message0: 通知特征 %1 数据更新
seeed_rpcble_characteristic_notify.tooltip: 向已订阅客户端发送通知

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_indicate.message0: 指示特征 %1 数据更新
seeed_rpcble_characteristic_indicate.tooltip: 发送需要确认的特征值指示

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_set_callback.tooltip: 设置特征写入回调，并缓存最近一次收到的文本

seeed_rpcble_characteristic_received_val.message0: 特征 %1 最近写入文本
seeed_rpcble_characteristic_received_val.tooltip: 读取特征写入回调缓存的最近文本

seeed_rpcble_advertising_add_service_uui.tooltip: 将服务 UUID 加入 BLE 广播数据

seeed_rpcble_advertising_set_scan_respon.tooltip: 设置是否启用扫描响应数据

seeed_rpcble_advertising_set_preferred.message0: 设置广播首选参数 最小 %1 最大 %2
seeed_rpcble_advertising_set_preferred.tooltip: 设置广播首选连接参数，常用于改善手机兼容性

seeed_rpcble_start_advertising.tooltip: 开始广播，使设备可被扫描发现

seeed_rpcble_scan_create.tooltip: 获取 BLEScan 扫描器对象

seeed_rpcble_scan_set_active.tooltip: 主动扫描更快但更耗电

seeed_rpcble_scan_set_interval.tooltip: 设置 BLE 扫描间隔

seeed_rpcble_scan_set_window.tooltip: 设置 BLE 扫描窗口，通常小于或等于扫描间隔

seeed_rpcble_scan_start.message0: 扫描器 %1 扫描 %2 秒 保存为 %3 %4
seeed_rpcble_scan_start.tooltip: 启动 BLE 扫描并保存扫描结果

seeed_rpcble_scan_stop.tooltip: 停止当前 BLE 扫描

seeed_rpcble_scan_clear_results.message0: 清除扫描器 %1 结果缓存
seeed_rpcble_scan_clear_results.tooltip: 清除扫描结果并释放内存

seeed_rpcble_scan_results_count.tooltip: 获取扫描到的 BLE 设备数量

seeed_rpcble_scan_result_name.message0: 扫描结果 %1 序号 %2 的名称
seeed_rpcble_scan_result_name.tooltip: 读取指定扫描结果的设备名称

seeed_rpcble_scan_result_address.message0: 扫描结果 %1 序号 %2 的地址
seeed_rpcble_scan_result_address.tooltip: 读取指定扫描结果的 MAC 地址

seeed_rpcble_scan_result_rssi.message0: 扫描结果 %1 序号 %2 的 RSSI
seeed_rpcble_scan_result_rssi.tooltip: 读取指定扫描结果的信号强度 RSSI

seeed_rpcble_scan_result_service_uuid.message0: 扫描结果 %1 序号 %2 的服务 UUID
seeed_rpcble_scan_result_service_uuid.tooltip: 读取指定扫描结果广播的第一个服务 UUID

seeed_rpcble_scan_result_info.message0: 扫描结果 %1 序号 %2 的完整信息
seeed_rpcble_scan_result_info.tooltip: 读取指定扫描结果的完整描述文本

seeed_rpcble_scan_result_has_service.message0: 扫描结果 %1 序号 %2 包含服务 UUID %3
seeed_rpcble_scan_result_has_service.tooltip: 判断指定扫描结果是否广播了目标服务 UUID

seeed_rpcble_create_client.tooltip: 创建 BLE GATT 客户端对象

seeed_rpcble_client_connect.message0: 客户端 %1 连接地址 %2 地址类型 %3
seeed_rpcble_client_connect.tooltip: 连接到指定 BLE MAC 地址

seeed_rpcble_client_disconnect.tooltip: 断开 BLE 客户端连接

seeed_rpcble_client_is_connected.tooltip: 判断 BLE 客户端是否已连接

seeed_rpcble_client_rssi.tooltip: 读取客户端连接的远端 RSSI

seeed_rpcble_client_get_service.message0: 客户端 %1 获取远端服务 %2 UUID %3
seeed_rpcble_client_get_service.tooltip: 从远端 BLE 服务端获取指定 GATT 服务

seeed_rpcble_remote_service_get_characte.message0: 远端服务 %1 获取特征 %2 UUID %3
seeed_rpcble_remote_service_get_characte.tooltip: 从远端 GATT 服务获取指定特征

seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_read.message0: 读取远端特征 %1 文本
seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_read.tooltip: 读取远端 BLE 特征值文本

seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_write.message0: 写入远端特征 %1 文本 %2 %3
seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_write.tooltip: 向远端 BLE 特征写入文本数据

seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_can_r.tooltip: 判断远端特征是否支持读取

seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_can_w.tooltip: 判断远端特征是否支持写入

seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_can_n.tooltip: 判断远端特征是否支持通知

seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_regis.message0: 订阅远端特征 %1 通知 %2
seeed_rpcble_remote_characteristic_regis.tooltip: 订阅远端特征通知并缓存收到的数据

seeed_rpcble_remote_notify_value.message0: 远端特征 %1 最近通知文本
seeed_rpcble_remote_notify_value.tooltip: 读取远端通知回调缓存的最近文本

seeed_rpcble_uart_begin.message0: 启动 BLE UART 服务 名称 %1
seeed_rpcble_uart_begin.tooltip: 创建 Nordic UART 风格 BLE 服务，适合手机或 Web Bluetooth 进行文本收发

seeed_rpcble_uart_send.tooltip: 通过 BLE UART TX 特征通知文本数据

seeed_rpcble_uart_connected.tooltip: 判断 BLE UART 是否有客户端连接

seeed_rpcble_uart_received.message0: BLE UART 最近收到文本
seeed_rpcble_uart_received.tooltip: 读取 BLE UART RX 特征最近收到的文本

seeed_rpcble_uart_on_receive.message0: 当 BLE UART 收到文本时
seeed_rpcble_uart_on_receive.tooltip: 设置 BLE UART 收到文本后的处理逻辑

seeed_rpcble_web_battery_begin.message0: 启动 Web Bluetooth 电池服务 名称 %1 初始电量 %2
seeed_rpcble_web_battery_begin.tooltip: 创建标准电池服务 0x180F，便于 Web Bluetooth 示例读取和订阅电量

seeed_rpcble_web_battery_set_level.message0: 设置 Web Bluetooth 电量 %1 %2
seeed_rpcble_web_battery_set_level.tooltip: 更新电池电量特征，可选择立即通知订阅客户端

seeed_rpcble_web_battery_level.tooltip: 读取电池服务缓存的当前电量

seeed_rpcble_web_battery_connected.message0: Web Bluetooth 电池服务已连接
seeed_rpcble_web_battery_connected.tooltip: 判断电池服务是否有客户端连接

seeed_rpcble_ibeacon_begin.message0: 启动 iBeacon 名称 %1 UUID %2 Major %3 Minor %4 厂商ID %5 功率 %6 信息 %7 类型 %8
seeed_rpcble_ibeacon_begin.tooltip: 配置并启动 iBeacon 广播，可附带扫描响应名称和文本信息
